explanation: Reordering: Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the Sigma rule's 'CommandLine|contains|all' logic is sensitive to argument order.
Insertion: Added quotes around the URL to test if the Sigma rule's 'CommandLine|contains|all' logic is sensitive to quoted strings.
Insertion: Added a benign '--safe-mode' argument to test if the Sigma rule's 'CommandLine|contains|all' logic is sensitive to additional non-malicious arguments.
